# Umbo

> Umbo is an oyster bar and restaurant in Traverse City, Michigan, from chef Cameron Rolka and Sarah Welch — the team behind Marrow and Mink in Detroit. The menu centers on oysters, tinned fish and conservas, caviar, and coastal small plates, with an all-Michigan natural wine list, plus Michigan beer and cider. Dinner service, vintage-seaside room, reservations by phone.

## Key facts

- Name: Umbo
- Type: Oyster bar & restaurant (seafood)
- Address: 430 E. Front Street, Traverse City, MI 49686, USA
- Phone: (231) 944-2797
- Email: sarah@eatumbo.com
- Hours: Thursday–Monday, 4:30pm–9:30pm. Closed Tuesday and Wednesday.
- Reservations: by phone only, for parties of 2–8. At least a third of the bar is held for walk-ins.
- Cuisine: seafood, oysters, tinned fish and conservas, caviar
- Drinks: all-Michigan natural wine, Michigan beer and cider
- Price range: $$$
- Owners: Cameron Rolka (chef) and Sarah Welch
- Also from the team behind: Marrow and Mink, Detroit

## Pages

- [Home](https://ryankolean.github.io/umbo/index.html): overview of Umbo — who we are and what we serve.
- [Menu](https://ryankolean.github.io/umbo/menu.html): tinned fish & conservas, à la carte plates, seasonal prix-fixe, all-Michigan wine, beer and cider, and non-alcoholic drinks.
- [About](https://ryankolean.github.io/umbo/about.html): the story and the team — Cameron Rolka and Sarah Welch, of Marrow and Mink, Detroit.
- [Events & Catering](https://ryankolean.github.io/umbo/events.html): private events, buyouts, raw bars, and coastal catering menus.
- [Visit](https://ryankolean.github.io/umbo/visit.html): hours, location, directions, and how to make a reservation.

## Contact

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/umbotraversecity/
- Reservations: call (231) 944-2797
